Back to RoweOS

Terms of Service

Last updated: February 24, 2026

Agreement

Acceptance of Terms

These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of RoweOS, a product of The Rowe Collection, LLC ("Company", "we", "us", "our"), located in Austin, Texas. By creating an account, subscribing to a plan, or using RoweOS in any way, you agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy.

If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use RoweOS.

Service

Description of Service

RoweOS is a private AI platform that provides brand intelligence (BrandAI) and personal life management (LifeAI) tools. The platform includes AI-powered chat agents, content generation, scheduling, social media publishing, analytics, and related features.

RoweOS connects to third-party AI providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google) using API keys you provide. We do not provide AI model access directly; you are responsible for maintaining your own API provider accounts and keys.

Accounts

Account Registration

  • You must be at least 13 years old to use RoweOS
  • You must provide accurate information when creating an account
  • You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials
  • You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account
  • You must notify us immediately if you suspect unauthorized access to your account
Plans & Billing

Subscriptions & Payment

Subscription Plans

RoweOS offers tiered subscription plans (including Founder and Premium tiers) with different feature sets. Plan details and pricing are displayed on our website and may be updated from time to time. You will be notified of any pricing changes before your next billing cycle.

Billing

Subscriptions are billed monthly on a recurring basis. Payment is processed through our third-party payment provider (Stripe). By subscribing, you authorize us to charge your payment method on a recurring monthly basis until you cancel.

Founder Pricing

Users who subscribe during the beta period receive Founder pricing, which is locked in at the Founder rate for the lifetime of their continuous subscription. If a Founder subscription lapses (is canceled and not renewed), Founder pricing may not be available upon re-subscription.

Free Beta Period

During the beta period, certain features or the full platform may be offered at no cost. We reserve the right to end the free beta period at any time with reasonable notice. When the beta period ends, continued access requires an active paid subscription.

Cancellation

Cancellation & Refunds

  • You may cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings or by contacting us
  • Cancellation takes effect at the end of your current billing period — you retain access until then
  • We do not provide prorated refunds for partial billing periods
  • If you believe you were charged in error, contact us within 30 days and we will review your case
API Keys

Third-Party API Keys & Costs

RoweOS requires API keys from third-party AI providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google) to power its AI features. You are solely responsible for:

  • Obtaining and maintaining your own API keys from these providers
  • All costs incurred from API usage through your keys — these charges come from the AI providers, not from us
  • Securing your API keys and preventing unauthorized use
  • Complying with each AI provider's terms of service and usage policies

Your API keys are stored exclusively in your browser's local storage and are never transmitted to or stored on our servers. RoweOS is not responsible for charges incurred on your API provider accounts.

Usage

Acceptable Use

You agree not to use RoweOS to:

  • Violate any applicable law, regulation, or third-party rights
  • Generate, store, or distribute illegal, harmful, or abusive content
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems or other users' accounts
  • Reverse-engineer, decompile, or disassemble the RoweOS platform
  • Resell, sublicense, or redistribute access to RoweOS without our written permission
  • Use automated tools to scrape, crawl, or extract data from RoweOS
  • Interfere with or disrupt the platform's operation or infrastructure

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.

Content

Your Content & Data

  • Ownership: You retain full ownership of all content you create, upload, or generate using RoweOS — including conversations, documents, brand configurations, and other materials
  • License to us: You grant us a limited license to store, display, and process your content solely for the purpose of providing the RoweOS service to you
  • Responsibility: You are responsible for the content you create and publish, including any content posted to social media platforms through RoweOS
  • AI-generated content: Content generated by AI models through RoweOS is subject to the respective AI provider's terms. You are responsible for reviewing AI-generated content before use or publication
Brand Sharing

Multi-Brand & Team Features

RoweOS allows users to share brand configurations with team members via setup links. When you share a brand configuration:

  • You are responsible for who you share your brand configuration with
  • Recipients receive a copy of your brand identity, settings, and operational configurations
  • Each team member maintains their own separate account, API keys, and personal LifeAI data
  • We are not responsible for how recipients use the shared brand configuration
Social Media

Social Media Publishing

RoweOS offers the ability to publish content to connected social media platforms. By using this feature:

  • You are solely responsible for all content posted through RoweOS to your social media accounts
  • You must comply with each platform's terms of service and community guidelines
  • We are not responsible for any consequences resulting from content you publish, including content generated by AI and posted through automations you configure
  • You can disconnect social accounts at any time, which immediately revokes posting access
Availability

Service Availability & Changes

  • We strive to maintain RoweOS availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted access
  • We may modify, update, or discontinue features at any time
  • We will provide reasonable notice before discontinuing core functionality or the platform itself
  • Scheduled maintenance will be communicated in advance when possible
Liability

Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law:

  • RoweOS is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, express or implied
  • We do not warrant that the service will be error-free, secure, or uninterrupted
  • We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of RoweOS
  • Our total liability for any claim arising from these Terms or your use of RoweOS shall not exceed the total amount you paid us in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim
  • We are not responsible for any costs, damages, or losses resulting from your use of third-party AI providers, social media platforms, or other external services accessed through RoweOS
Indemnification

Indemnification

You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless The Rowe Collection, LLC and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, and expenses (including legal fees) arising from:

  • Your use of RoweOS
  • Your violation of these Terms
  • Content you create, generate, or publish through the platform
  • Your violation of any third-party rights
Termination

Termination

  • You may terminate your account at any time by contacting us
  • We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these Terms, with or without notice depending on severity
  • Upon termination, your right to access RoweOS ceases immediately
  • Data stored locally in your browser remains accessible to you. Cloud-synced data will be deleted upon request per our Privacy Policy
Legal

Governing Law & Disputes

These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Texas, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising from these Terms or your use of RoweOS shall be resolved in the courts located in Travis County, Texas.

Updates

Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms from time to time. Changes will be reflected by the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. We will notify users of material changes via email or in-app notification. Continued use of RoweOS after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

Contact

Contact Us

If you have questions about these Terms of Service, contact us:

The Rowe Collection, LLC

Austin, Texas

Email: jordan@therowecollection.com

Web: roweos.com
